zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim於1108年1月8日出生在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希時，她的父親Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten43歲，母親Uta von Passau22歲。她於1126年與Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1161年12月13日在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易享年53歲，埋葬在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾瑟勒斯塔特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim于1108年1月8日出生在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希时，她的父亲Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten43岁，母亲Uta von Passau22岁。她于1126年与Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1161年12月13日在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易享年53岁，埋葬在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾瑟勒斯塔特。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim was born on 8 January 1108, in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, her father, Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten, was 43 and her mother, Uta von Passau, was 22. She married Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois in 1126. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 13 December 1161, in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 53, and was buried in Sélestat, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim est née le 8 janvier 1108, à Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, son père, Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Uta von Passau, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois en 1126. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 décembre 1161, à Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Sélestat, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim am 8. Januar 1108 in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten 43 und ihre Mutter Uta von Passau 22. Sie hat 1126 Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. Dezember 1161 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Schlettstadt, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim è nata il il 8 gennaio 1108 nel Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, sua padre, Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Uta von Passau, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois nel 1126. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 13 dicembre 1161, nel Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Sélestat, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheimが1108年1月8日にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルナンシで生まれた時，父Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärntenは43歳，母Uta von Passauは22歳であった。1126年にThibaut IV le Grand de Bloisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1161年12月13日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーフォンテvラウルト-ル'アッバイで53歳で死去し，フランスアルサスバス-ルヒンスeレスタトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim(이)가 1108년 1월 8일 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 난시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Uta von Passau(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1126년 Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1161년 12월 13일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 스e레스타트에 묻혔다.

pt.8 January 1108–13 December 1161: 8 de janeiro de 1108–13 de dezembro de 1161
pt.Fontevraud-l'Abbaye, Departement de Main: Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França
pt.Blois, County of Blois: Blois 2e Canton, Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim nasceu em 8 de janeiro de 1108, em Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Uta von Passau, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois em 1126. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de dezembro de 1161, em Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Sélestat, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França.

ru.Fontevraud-l'Abbaye, Departement de Main: фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.Blois, County of Blois: блоис 2 кантон, блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim родилась 8 января 1108 г. в местности нанси, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция, её отцу по имени Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Uta von Passau, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois в 1126 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 13 декабря 1161 г. в местности фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности сeлестат, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim nació el 8 de enero de 1108, en Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Uta von Passau, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois en 1126. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 13 de diciembre de 1161, en Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Sélestat, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia.
